rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third Party John Cahill, Jr. Pursuant To Subpoena Andor For An Order That John Cahill, Jr. Comply With Deposition Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the deposition of third party John Cahill, Jr. and for an order that Mr. Cahill comply with deposition subpoena is continued to April 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per agreement of counsel at the informal discovery meeting on March 22, 2013. = (503/TLJ)
